name: Cocktail Okra
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash the okra and pack it into clean jars with screw tops.
2 In each jar, place one hot pepper and one clove of garlic.
3 Bring together the remaining ingredients to a boil.
4 Pour the boiling liquid over the okra in the jars, filling them to overflowing.
5 Seal the jars while still hot.
6 Allow the mixture to age for 2 months before using.
